name: strongmind-platform-sdk

metadata.name: strongmind-platform-sdk
metadata.summary: Common utilities, models, and clients used with StrongMind Platform APIs

documentation:
# platform-python-sdk

This Python package is intended to provide clients and models for accessing the Platform APIs.

**Current Version**: `3.2.0`

## Requirements.

Python 3.6

## Installation & Usage
### pip install

```sh
pip install strongmind-platform-sdk
```

Then import and use the package:
```python
from strongmind_platform_sdk.platform_sdk.clients.oneroster_client import get_authenticated_oneroster_client
from oneroster_client.api.enrollments_management_api import EnrollmentsManagementApi
base_client = get_authenticated_oneroster_client(
            base_url,
            id_server_base_url,
            client_id,
            client_secret
        )

enrollments_client = EnrollmentsManagementApi(base_client)
enrollment = enrollments_client.get_enrollment("{UUID}")
```

## OneRoster Diagram
![spec-image018](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3137263/156631023-7bade029-d038-4a64-88d3-104d416d7d90.jpeg)

methods.name: test.test_oneroster_client.TestOneRosterClient.test_get_enrollments_with_parents
documentation:
Given an enrollment sourced id
Then we should return a OneRoster SingleEnrollmentType
Where the user, class, and school/org types associated with the enrollment
are on the enrollment object

methods.name: test.test_oneroster_client.TestOneRosterClient.test_get_enrollments_with_parents_and_course
documentation:
Given an enrollment sourced id
Then we should return a OneRoster SingleEnrollmentType
Where the user, class, and school/org types associated with the enrollment
are on the enrollment object and the course associated with the class is on the
class object nested within the enrollment object

methods.name: test.test_oneroster_client.TestOneRosterClient.test_get_class_with_parents
documentation:
Given a class sourced id
Then we should return a OneRoster SingleClassType
where the course, org, and academic session objects associated with the class
are on the class object

methods.name: test.test_identity_client.TestIdentityTokenRetrieval.test_identity_client_issues_new_token_when_token_is_about_to_expire
documentation:
When the token is within a 30 second period from expring
Then should get a new one so that we can have access
So that tokens do not expire while we are using them

methods.name: test.test_identity_client.TestIdentityTokenRetrieval.test_identity_client_issues_same_token_when_one_exists
documentation:
When there is a token that is not expired,
we should reuse it so that we can have access and we aren't getting tokens all the time
